since_last: 67% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +3.38%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 67% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.64% · BTC -0.59% · Gold -1.03% · Nasdaq100 +1.09%. 67% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +3.38%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +3.38%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.52%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: HON is the standout at -47.95%
cards.body: Leaders: AMAT +9.39%, PANW +7.70%, KLAC +6.72%, CRWD +6.45%, LRCX +6.16%. Laggards: HON -47.95%, MU -5.68%, SOUN -3.51%, INTC -2.77%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.20% at $155.07
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.20% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
